title: fagraea fastigiata
intro: Fagraea fastigiata, also known as the Straits Gardenia, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical rainforests of Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Fagraea fastigiata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The plant's herbal preparations typically involve drying and processing the leaves or flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications for various health issues.
